scope: Wire upstream terminal title side effects into the live AgenC TUI shell

requiredBehaviors: live TUI shell calls the upstream terminal-title hook from a leaf component
disabled title state passes null through to the hook
non-disabled title state writes the computed title through the upstream hook
edgeCases: title hook remains a no-op when disabled
title text can be composed from provider and model when both are available
title text falls back to the product name when model metadata is absent

requiredBehaviors: terminal title animation uses the upstream two-frame spinner and 960ms interval
animation state is isolated in a leaf component so title ticks do not drive shell state
title animation is suppressed while the session waits for permission or renders local JSX
edgeCases: animation interval is not started when the terminal is unfocused
animation interval is not started when title prefixing is disabled
static prefix remains stable while no turn is streaming
